---
title: "l1_turning_point_0.3"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-04"
---

```{r}

source("C:/Users/20231809/Desktop/study/Y3/Q3/BEP/set up/RegularizedESEM-main/RegularizedESEM-main/Functions/rESEM-l1.R")
source("C:/Users/20231809/Desktop/study/Y3/Q3/BEP/set up/RegularizedESEM-main/RegularizedESEM-main/Functions/rESEMl1-unshrink.R")
source("C:/Users/20231809/Desktop/study/Y3/Q3/BEP/set up/RegularizedESEM-main/RegularizedESEM-main/Functions/IS-lasso.R")
source("C:/Users/20231809/Desktop/study/Y3/Q3/BEP/set up/RegularizedESEM-main/RegularizedESEM-main/Functions/generation_function.R")

library(MASS); library(lavaan); library(lslx)

# Helper Function 1: build_lslx_model

build_lslx_model <- function(J, n_factors = 3) {
  J_per_factor <- J / n_factors
  lines <- c()
   # Step 1: Write main loadings
  for (k in 1:n_factors) {
    main_items <- paste0("x", ((k-1)*J_per_factor + 1):(k*J_per_factor))
    lines <- c(lines, paste0("f", k, " :=> ", paste(main_items, collapse = " + ")))
  }
  # Step 2: Write cross-loadings (loadings on items from other factors, penalized by LASSO)
  for (k in 1:n_factors) {
    other_items <- paste0("x", setdiff(1:J, ((k-1)*J_per_factor + 1):(k*J_per_factor)))
    lines <- c(lines, paste0("f", k, " :~> ", paste(other_items, collapse = " + ")))
  }
   # Step 3: Fix each factor's variance to 1
  for (k in 1:n_factors) {
    lines <- c(lines, paste0("f", k, " <=> fix(1) * f", k))
  }
  paste(lines, collapse = "\n")
}

# Helper Function 2: run_lslx

# Purpose: Run lslx on one dataset, return the estimated loading matrix
run_lslx <- function(X, J, n_factors = 3) {
  X_df <- as.data.frame(X); colnames(X_df) <- paste0("x", 1:J)
  model <- build_lslx_model(J = J, n_factors = n_factors)
  lambda_grid <- if (J >= 36) c(0.00, 0.10) else seq(0.00, 0.10, 0.05)# Set lambda grid (range of penalty values to try)\\Fewer values when J is large, to save time
  result <- tryCatch({
    fit <- plsem(model = model, data = X_df,
                 penalty_method = "lasso", lambda_grid = lambda_grid)#  Search these lambda values
    list(converged = TRUE,
         loadings = fit$extract_coefficient_matrix(selector="bic", block="y<-f")$g) # Use BIC criterion to select best lambda, extract loading matrix
  }, error = function(e) list(converged = FALSE, loadings = NULL))
  return(result)
}

# Purpose: Factor analysis has "permutation ambiguity" and "sign ambiguity"
#          e.g., true order is [f1,f2,f3] but estimated might be [f3,f1,f2],
#          or f1's signs are all flipped. This function aligns them before computing MSE.

align_loadings <- function(Lambda_est, Lambda_true) {
  n_factors <- ncol(Lambda_true)
  
  cor_mat <- matrix(NA, n_factors, n_factors) # Step 1: Compute absolute correlation between every pair of estimated vs true factors
  for (i in 1:n_factors)
    for (j in 1:n_factors)
      cor_mat[i, j] <- abs(cor(Lambda_est[, i], Lambda_true[, j]))
  
  # Step 2: Greedy matching — find best permutation of factors
  order_est <- rep(NA, n_factors); used <- rep(FALSE, n_factors)# Track which estimated factors are matched
  
  for (j in 1:n_factors) {  # Find the estimated factor most correlated with true factor j, not yet used
    best_i <- which.max(cor_mat[, j] * (!used))
    order_est[j] <- best_i; used[best_i] <- TRUE
  }
   # Reorder estimated loading matrix according to best permutation
  Lambda_aligned <- Lambda_est[, order_est]
  
   # Step 3: Fix signs — if direction is flipped, multiply by -1
  for (j in 1:n_factors)
    if (cor(Lambda_aligned[, j], Lambda_true[, j]) < 0)
      Lambda_aligned[, j] <- -Lambda_aligned[, j]
  colnames(Lambda_aligned) <- paste0("f", 1:n_factors)
  return(Lambda_aligned)
}

#  Run LASSO-ESEM on one dataset, return estimated loading matrix
run_approxESEM <- function(X, J, n_factors = 3, nstarts = 20, Lambda_true = NULL) {
   # Standardize data first
  #  makes each column mean=0, sd=1
  X_scaled <- scale(as.matrix(X))
  result <- tryCatch({
    lam_max <- find_lambda_max(DATA    = X_scaled,
                               R       = n_factors,
                               MaxIter = 250,
                               eps     = 1e-5,
                               nstarts = 1,        #  1 start (for speed)
                               verbose = FALSE)

    lam_sel <- IS_strategy(X          = X_scaled,
                           R          = n_factors,
                           MaxIter    = 250,
                           eps        = 1e-5,
                           nstarts    = 1,          #  1 start (for speed)
                           lambda_max = lam_max)

    fit <- MULTISTART_rESEMl1(DATA    = X_scaled,
                              R       = n_factors,
                              lambda  = lam_sel,
                              MaxIter = 1000,
                              eps     = 1e-6,
                              nstarts = nstarts)   # 20 

    fit_us <- rESEMl1_undoshrinkage(DATA    = X_scaled,
                                    R       = n_factors,
                                    P       = fit$loadings,
                                    MaxIter = 1000,
                                    eps     = 1e-6)

    lm <- fit_us$loadings
    rownames(lm) <- paste0("x", 1:J)
    colnames(lm) <- paste0("f", 1:n_factors)
    if (!is.null(Lambda_true)) lm <- align_loadings(lm, Lambda_true)

    list(converged = fit$converged, loadings = lm)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("ESEM error: ", e$message)
    list(converged = FALSE, loadings = NULL)
  })
  return(result)
}


# test：J = 15, 30, 45, 60，N = 300

set.seed(42)
N      <- 300
J_test <- c(15, 30, 45, 60)


timing_results <- data.frame(
  J             = integer(),
  lslx_time_sec = numeric(),
  esem_time_sec = numeric(),
  lslx_converged = logical(),
  esem_converged  = logical(),
  lslx_mse      = numeric(),
  esem_mse      = numeric()
)

for (J in J_test) {
  cat("▶ J =", J, "\n")

  dgp <- data_generation(PL = 0.6, nvar.factor = J/3, nfactors = 3,
                         reliability = 0.36, factor_corr = 0.3, N = N,
                         beta = c(0.5, 0.3, 0.2), VAFy = 0.5, CL = FALSE)

  cat("  running lslx  ... ")
  t1 <- system.time({ r1 <- run_lslx(X = dgp$X, J = J) })
  cat(round(t1["elapsed"], 2), "s\n")

  cat("  running ESEM  ... ")
  t2 <- system.time({ r2 <- run_approxESEM(X = dgp$X, J = J, Lambda_true = dgp$Ptrue) })
  cat(round(t2["elapsed"], 2), "s\n")

  mse1 <- if (r1$converged) round(mean((r1$loadings - dgp$Ptrue)^2), 4) else NA
  mse2 <- if (r2$converged) round(mean((r2$loadings - dgp$Ptrue)^2), 4) else NA

  cat("  lslx  | converged:", r1$converged, "| MSE:", mse1, "\n")
  cat("  ESEM  | converged:", r2$converged, "| MSE:", mse2, "\n\n")

  timing_results <- rbind(timing_results, data.frame(
    J               = J,
    lslx_time_sec   = round(t1["elapsed"], 2),
    esem_time_sec   = round(t2["elapsed"], 2),
    lslx_converged  = r1$converged,
    esem_converged  = r2$converged,
    lslx_mse        = mse1,
    esem_mse        = mse2
  ))
}

```

```{r}
print(timing_results, row.names = FALSE)
```


```{r}

source("C:/Users/20231809/Desktop/study/Y3/Q3/BEP/set up/RegularizedESEM-main/RegularizedESEM-main/Functions/rESEM-l1.R")
source("C:/Users/20231809/Desktop/study/Y3/Q3/BEP/set up/RegularizedESEM-main/RegularizedESEM-main/Functions/rESEMl1-unshrink.R")
source("C:/Users/20231809/Desktop/study/Y3/Q3/BEP/set up/RegularizedESEM-main/RegularizedESEM-main/Functions/IS-lasso.R")
source("C:/Users/20231809/Desktop/study/Y3/Q3/BEP/set up/RegularizedESEM-main/RegularizedESEM-main/Functions/generation_function.R")

library(MASS); library(lavaan); library(lslx)


build_lslx_model <- function(J, n_factors = 3) {
  J_per_factor <- J / n_factors
  lines <- c()
  for (k in 1:n_factors) {
    main_items <- paste0("x", ((k-1)*J_per_factor + 1):(k*J_per_factor))
    lines <- c(lines, paste0("f", k, " :=> ", paste(main_items, collapse = " + ")))
  }
  for (k in 1:n_factors) {
    other_items <- paste0("x", setdiff(1:J, ((k-1)*J_per_factor + 1):(k*J_per_factor)))
    lines <- c(lines, paste0("f", k, " :~> ", paste(other_items, collapse = " + ")))
  }
  for (k in 1:n_factors) {
    lines <- c(lines, paste0("f", k, " <=> fix(1) * f", k))
  }
  paste(lines, collapse = "\n")
}

run_lslx <- function(X, J, n_factors = 3) {
  X_df <- as.data.frame(X); colnames(X_df) <- paste0("x", 1:J)
  model <- build_lslx_model(J = J, n_factors = n_factors)
  lambda_grid <- if (J >= 36) c(0.00, 0.10) else seq(0.00, 0.10, 0.05)
  result <- tryCatch({
    fit <- plsem(model = model, data = X_df,
                 penalty_method = "lasso", lambda_grid = lambda_grid)
    list(converged = TRUE,
         loadings = fit$extract_coefficient_matrix(selector="bic", block="y<-f")$g)
  }, error = function(e) list(converged = FALSE, loadings = NULL))
  return(result)
}

align_loadings <- function(Lambda_est, Lambda_true) {
  n_factors <- ncol(Lambda_true)
  cor_mat <- matrix(NA, n_factors, n_factors)
  for (i in 1:n_factors)
    for (j in 1:n_factors)
      cor_mat[i, j] <- abs(cor(Lambda_est[, i], Lambda_true[, j]))
  order_est <- rep(NA, n_factors); used <- rep(FALSE, n_factors)
  for (j in 1:n_factors) {
    best_i <- which.max(cor_mat[, j] * (!used))
    order_est[j] <- best_i; used[best_i] <- TRUE
  }
  Lambda_aligned <- Lambda_est[, order_est]
  for (j in 1:n_factors)
    if (cor(Lambda_aligned[, j], Lambda_true[, j]) < 0)
      Lambda_aligned[, j] <- -Lambda_aligned[, j]
  colnames(Lambda_aligned) <- paste0("f", 1:n_factors)
  return(Lambda_aligned)
}

run_approxESEM <- function(X, J, n_factors = 3, nstarts = 20, Lambda_true = NULL) {
  X_scaled <- scale(as.matrix(X))
  result <- tryCatch({
    lam_max <- find_lambda_max(DATA    = X_scaled,
                               R       = n_factors,
                               MaxIter = 250,
                               eps     = 1e-5,
                               nstarts = 1,
                               verbose = FALSE)

    lam_sel <- IS_strategy(X          = X_scaled,
                           R          = n_factors,
                           MaxIter    = 250,
                           eps        = 1e-5,
                           nstarts    = 1,
                           lambda_max = lam_max)

    fit <- MULTISTART_rESEMl1(DATA    = X_scaled,
                              R       = n_factors,
                              lambda  = lam_sel,
                              MaxIter = 1000,
                              eps     = 1e-6,
                              nstarts = nstarts)

    fit_us <- rESEMl1_undoshrinkage(DATA    = X_scaled,
                                    R       = n_factors,
                                    P       = fit$loadings,
                                    MaxIter = 1000,
                                    eps     = 1e-6)

    lm <- fit_us$loadings
    rownames(lm) <- paste0("x", 1:J)
    colnames(lm) <- paste0("f", 1:n_factors)
    if (!is.null(Lambda_true)) lm <- align_loadings(lm, Lambda_true)

    list(converged = fit$converged, loadings = lm)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("ESEM error: ", e$message)
    list(converged = FALSE, loadings = NULL)
  })
  return(result)
}
```


```{r}

# 50 replications：N = 300，J change

set.seed(42)
N      <- 300
J_seq  <- seq(15, 45, by = 3)
n_rep  <- 50

cat("开始运行 N =", N, "，J =", paste(J_seq, collapse = ", "), "，各", n_rep, "次\n\n")

plot_df <- data.frame(
  J              = integer(),
  lslx_mse_mean  = numeric(),
  lslx_mse_sd    = numeric(),
  esem_mse_mean  = numeric(),
  esem_mse_sd    = numeric(),
  lslx_time      = numeric(),
  esem_time      = numeric(),
  lslx_conv_rate = numeric()
)

for (J in J_seq) {
  cat("▶ J =", J, "\n")

  lslx_mse_vec  <- numeric(n_rep)
  esem_mse_vec  <- numeric(n_rep)
  lslx_time_vec <- numeric(n_rep)
  esem_time_vec <- numeric(n_rep)
  lslx_conv_vec <- logical(n_rep)

  for (rep in 1:n_rep) {
    dgp <- data_generation(PL = 0.6, nvar.factor = J/3, nfactors = 3,
                           reliability = 0.36, factor_corr = 0.3, N = N,
                           beta = c(0.5, 0.3, 0.2), VAFy = 0.5, CL = FALSE)

    t1 <- system.time({ r1 <- run_lslx(X = dgp$X, J = J) })
    t2 <- system.time({ r2 <- run_approxESEM(X = dgp$X, J = J, Lambda_true = dgp$Ptrue) })

    lslx_conv_vec[rep] <- r1$converged
    lslx_mse_vec[rep]  <- if (r1$converged) mean((r1$loadings - dgp$Ptrue)^2) else NA
    esem_mse_vec[rep]  <- if (r2$converged) mean((r2$loadings - dgp$Ptrue)^2) else NA
    lslx_time_vec[rep] <- t1["elapsed"]
    esem_time_vec[rep] <- t2["elapsed"]
  }

  cat("   lslx coverage rate:", mean(lslx_conv_vec),
      "| ave MSE:", round(mean(lslx_mse_vec, na.rm=TRUE), 4),
      "| average runtime:", round(mean(lslx_time_vec), 2), "s\n")
  cat("   ESEM average MSE:", round(mean(esem_mse_vec, na.rm=TRUE), 4),
      "|  average runtime:", round(mean(esem_time_vec), 2), "s\n\n")

  plot_df <- rbind(plot_df, data.frame(
    J              = J,
    lslx_mse_mean  = mean(lslx_mse_vec,  na.rm = TRUE),
    lslx_mse_sd    = sd(lslx_mse_vec,    na.rm = TRUE),
    esem_mse_mean  = mean(esem_mse_vec,  na.rm = TRUE),
    esem_mse_sd    = sd(esem_mse_vec,    na.rm = TRUE),
    lslx_time      = mean(lslx_time_vec),
    esem_time      = mean(esem_time_vec),
    lslx_conv_rate = mean(lslx_conv_vec)
  ))
}


# plot：MSE + Runtime + Runtime Ratio

par(mfrow = c(1, 3), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1), oma = c(0, 0, 2, 0))
x <- plot_df$J

#  MSE 
ylim_mse <- range(c(plot_df$lslx_mse_mean + plot_df$lslx_mse_sd,
                    plot_df$esem_mse_mean  + plot_df$esem_mse_sd,
                    plot_df$lslx_mse_mean  - plot_df$lslx_mse_sd,
                    plot_df$esem_mse_mean  - plot_df$esem_mse_sd),
                  na.rm = TRUE)

plot(x, plot_df$lslx_mse_mean,
     type = "b", pch = 16, col = "#E63946", lwd = 2,
     ylim = ylim_mse,
     xlab = "J (Number of Items)", ylab = "MSE",
     main = paste0("MSE vs J  (N=", N, ", ", n_rep, " reps)"),
     xaxt = "n")
axis(1, at = J_seq)
polygon(c(x, rev(x)),
        c(plot_df$lslx_mse_mean + plot_df$lslx_mse_sd,
          rev(plot_df$lslx_mse_mean - plot_df$lslx_mse_sd)),
        col = adjustcolor("#E63946", 0.15), border = NA)
lines(x, plot_df$esem_mse_mean,
      type = "b", pch = 17, col = "#457B9D", lwd = 2, lty = 2)
polygon(c(x, rev(x)),
        c(plot_df$esem_mse_mean + plot_df$esem_mse_sd,
          rev(plot_df$esem_mse_mean - plot_df$esem_mse_sd)),
        col = adjustcolor("#457B9D", 0.15), border = NA)
legend("topleft", legend = c("lslx", "LASSO-ESEM"),
       col = c("#E63946", "#457B9D"),
       lwd = 2, pch = c(16, 17), lty = c(1, 2), bty = "n")

#  Runtime 
ylim_t <- range(c(plot_df$lslx_time, plot_df$esem_time), na.rm = TRUE)

plot(x, plot_df$lslx_time,
     type = "b", pch = 16, col = "#E63946", lwd = 2,
     ylim = ylim_t,
     xlab = "J (Number of Items)", ylab = "Elapsed time (sec)",
     main = paste0("Mean Runtime vs J  (N=", N, ", ", n_rep, " reps)"),
     xaxt = "n")
axis(1, at = J_seq)
lines(x, plot_df$esem_time,
      type = "b", pch = 17, col = "#457B9D", lwd = 2, lty = 2)
legend("topleft", legend = c("lslx", "LASSO-ESEM"),
       col = c("#E63946", "#457B9D"),
       lwd = 2, pch = c(16, 17), lty = c(1, 2), bty = "n")

#  Runtime Ratio (lslx / LASSO-ESEM) ---
ratio <- plot_df$lslx_time / plot_df$esem_time

plot(x, ratio,
     type = "b", pch = 18, col = "#2D6A4F", lwd = 2,
     ylim = c(0, max(ratio, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.15),
     xlab = "J (Number of Items)", ylab = "lslx time / LASSO-ESEM time",
     main = paste0("Runtime Ratio vs J  (N=", N, ", ", n_rep, " reps)"),
     xaxt = "n")
axis(1, at = J_seq)
abline(h = 1, lty = 2, col = "gray50")
text(x, ratio, labels = round(ratio, 1),
     pos = 3, cex = 0.75, col = "#2D6A4F")

mtext(paste0("LASSO-ESEM vs lslx  |  N = ", N),
      outer = TRUE, cex = 1.1, font = 2)

par(mfrow = c(1, 1))

cat("\data：\n")
print(plot_df, row.names = FALSE, digits = 4)
```

```{r}

# Turning Point ：J = 15, 18, ..., 30

# 50 replications

J_seq  <- seq(15, 30, by = 3)
N_seq  <- seq(100, 600, by = 100)
n_rep  <- 50

cat(" Turning Point start\n")
cat("J =", paste(J_seq, collapse=", "), "\n")
cat("N =", paste(N_seq, collapse=", "), "\n")
cat("replications =", n_rep, "\n\n")

# save data
tp_df <- data.frame(
  J              = integer(),
  N              = integer(),
  JN_ratio       = numeric(),
  lslx_mse_mean  = numeric(),
  lslx_mse_sd    = numeric(),
  esem_mse_mean  = numeric(),
  esem_mse_sd    = numeric(),
  lslx_time      = numeric(),
  esem_time      = numeric(),
  lslx_conv_rate = numeric()
)

for (J in J_seq) {
  for (N in N_seq) {
    cat("▶ J =", J, "| N =", N, "(J/N =", round(J/N, 3), ")\n")

    lslx_mse_vec  <- numeric(n_rep)
    esem_mse_vec  <- numeric(n_rep)
    lslx_time_vec <- numeric(n_rep)
    esem_time_vec <- numeric(n_rep)
    lslx_conv_vec <- logical(n_rep)

    for (rep in 1:n_rep) {
      dgp <- data_generation(PL = 0.6, nvar.factor = J/3, nfactors = 3,
                             reliability = 0.36, factor_corr = 0.3, N = N,
                             beta = c(0.5, 0.3, 0.2), VAFy = 0.5, CL = FALSE)

      t1 <- system.time({ r1 <- run_lslx(X = dgp$X, J = J) })
      t2 <- system.time({ r2 <- run_approxESEM(X = dgp$X, J = J, Lambda_true = dgp$Ptrue) })

      lslx_conv_vec[rep] <- r1$converged
      lslx_mse_vec[rep]  <- if (r1$converged) mean((r1$loadings - dgp$Ptrue)^2) else NA
      esem_mse_vec[rep]  <- if (r2$converged) mean((r2$loadings - dgp$Ptrue)^2) else NA
      lslx_time_vec[rep] <- t1["elapsed"]
      esem_time_vec[rep] <- t2["elapsed"]
    }

    cat("   lslx coverage rate:", round(mean(lslx_conv_vec), 3),
        "| MSE:", round(mean(lslx_mse_vec, na.rm=TRUE), 4),
        "| runtime:", round(mean(lslx_time_vec), 2), "s\n")
    cat("   ESEM MSE:", round(mean(esem_mse_vec, na.rm=TRUE), 4),
        "| runtime:", round(mean(esem_time_vec), 2), "s\n\n")

    tp_df <- rbind(tp_df, data.frame(
      J              = J,
      N              = N,
      JN_ratio       = J / N,
      lslx_mse_mean  = mean(lslx_mse_vec,  na.rm = TRUE),
      lslx_mse_sd    = sd(lslx_mse_vec,    na.rm = TRUE),
      esem_mse_mean  = mean(esem_mse_vec,  na.rm = TRUE),
      esem_mse_sd    = sd(esem_mse_vec,    na.rm = TRUE),
      lslx_time      = mean(lslx_time_vec),
      esem_time      = mean(esem_time_vec),
      lslx_conv_rate = mean(lslx_conv_vec)
    ))
  }
}

#visulization 
cols   <- c("#E63946","#F4A261","#2A9D8F","#457B9D","#6A4C93","#2D6A4F")
J_cols <- setNames(cols[1:length(J_seq)], as.character(J_seq))

par(mfrow = c(2, 2), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1), oma = c(0, 0, 2, 0))

# lslx MSE vs N，
ylim_lslx <- range(c(tp_df$lslx_mse_mean + tp_df$lslx_mse_sd,
                     tp_df$lslx_mse_mean - tp_df$lslx_mse_sd), na.rm=TRUE)
plot(NULL, xlim = range(N_seq), ylim = ylim_lslx,
     xlab = "N", ylab = "MSE", main = "lslx MSE vs N",
     xaxt = "n")
axis(1, at = N_seq)
for (j in J_seq) {
  sub <- tp_df[tp_df$J == j, ]
  lines(sub$N, sub$lslx_mse_mean, type="b", pch=16,
        col=J_cols[as.character(j)], lwd=2)
  polygon(c(sub$N, rev(sub$N)),
          c(sub$lslx_mse_mean + sub$lslx_mse_sd,
            rev(sub$lslx_mse_mean - sub$lslx_mse_sd)),
          col=adjustcolor(J_cols[as.character(j)], 0.12), border=NA)
}
legend("topright", legend=paste0("J=",J_seq),
       col=J_cols, lwd=2, pch=16, bty="n", cex=0.8)

#  ESEM MSE vs N 
ylim_esem <- range(c(tp_df$esem_mse_mean + tp_df$esem_mse_sd,
                     tp_df$esem_mse_mean - tp_df$esem_mse_sd), na.rm=TRUE)
plot(NULL, xlim = range(N_seq), ylim = ylim_esem,
     xlab = "N", ylab = "MSE", main = "LASSO-ESEM MSE vs N",
     xaxt = "n")
axis(1, at = N_seq)
for (j in J_seq) {
  sub <- tp_df[tp_df$J == j, ]
  lines(sub$N, sub$esem_mse_mean, type="b", pch=17,
        col=J_cols[as.character(j)], lwd=2, lty=2)
  polygon(c(sub$N, rev(sub$N)),
          c(sub$esem_mse_mean + sub$esem_mse_sd,
            rev(sub$esem_mse_mean - sub$esem_mse_sd)),
          col=adjustcolor(J_cols[as.character(j)], 0.12), border=NA)
}
legend("topright", legend=paste0("J=",J_seq),
       col=J_cols, lwd=2, pch=17, lty=2, bty="n", cex=0.8)

#  Runtime vs N 
ylim_t <- range(c(tp_df$lslx_time, tp_df$esem_time), na.rm=TRUE)
plot(NULL, xlim = range(N_seq), ylim = ylim_t,
     xlab = "N", ylab = "Elapsed time (sec)", main = "Mean Runtime vs N",
     xaxt = "n")
axis(1, at = N_seq)
for (j in J_seq) {
  sub <- tp_df[tp_df$J == j, ]
  lines(sub$N, sub$lslx_time, type="b", pch=16,
        col=J_cols[as.character(j)], lwd=2)
  lines(sub$N, sub$esem_time, type="b", pch=17,
        col=J_cols[as.character(j)], lwd=2, lty=2)
}
legend("topleft",
       legend=c(paste0("lslx J=",J_seq[1]), paste0("ESEM J=",J_seq[1]),
                "... (same colors per J)"),
       col=c(J_cols[1], J_cols[1], NA),
       lwd=2, pch=c(16,17,NA), lty=c(1,2,NA), bty="n", cex=0.75)

#  Runtime Ratio vs N 
tp_df$ratio <- tp_df$lslx_time / tp_df$esem_time
ylim_r <- range(tp_df$ratio, na.rm=TRUE)
plot(NULL, xlim = range(N_seq), ylim = c(0, max(ylim_r)*1.1),
     xlab = "N", ylab = "lslx / ESEM time", main = "Runtime Ratio vs N",
     xaxt = "n")
axis(1, at = N_seq)
abline(h = 1, lty = 2, col = "gray60")
for (j in J_seq) {
  sub <- tp_df[tp_df$J == j, ]
  lines(sub$N, sub$ratio, type="b", pch=18,
        col=J_cols[as.character(j)], lwd=2)
}
legend("topright", legend=paste0("J=",J_seq),
       col=J_cols, lwd=2, pch=18, bty="n", cex=0.8)

mtext("Turning Point Scan  |  LASSO-ESEM vs lslx",
      outer=TRUE, cex=1.1, font=2)

par(mfrow = c(1,1))


cat("\ndataset：\n")
print(tp_df[, c("J","N","JN_ratio","lslx_mse_mean","esem_mse_mean",
                "lslx_time","esem_time","ratio","lslx_conv_rate")],
      row.names=FALSE, digits=4)
```
```{r}
# ============================================================
# 细化扫描：J = 15–30，factor_corr = 0.3，50 reps
# 每个J有自己的N范围和间隔
# ============================================================
set.seed(42)
n_rep <- 50

scan_grid <- list(
  "15" = seq(50, 150, by = 20),
  "18" = seq(60,  200, by = 20),
  "21" = seq(120, 320, by = 20),
  "24" = seq(100, 320, by = 20),
  "27" = seq(130, 400, by = 30),
  "30" = seq(100, 500, by = 50)
)

J_seq_main  <- c(15, 18, 21, 24, 27, 30)
results_all <- list()

cat("=== 扫描开始：J = 15–30，factor_corr = 0.3 ===\n\n")

for (J in J_seq_main) {
  N_vec <- scan_grid[[as.character(J)]]
  cat("▶▶ J =", J,
      "| N:", min(N_vec), "~", max(N_vec),
      "| step:", unique(diff(N_vec)),
      "| 共", length(N_vec), "个 N × 50 reps\n")

  for (N in N_vec) {
    lslx_mse_vec  <- numeric(n_rep)
    esem_mse_vec  <- numeric(n_rep)
    lslx_time_vec <- numeric(n_rep)
    esem_time_vec <- numeric(n_rep)
    lslx_conv_vec <- logical(n_rep)

    for (rep in 1:n_rep) {
      dgp <- data_generation(
        PL = 0.6, nvar.factor = J / 3, nfactors = 3,
        reliability = 0.36, factor_corr = 0.3,        # ← 0.3相关
        N = N, beta = c(0.5, 0.3, 0.2),
        VAFy = 0.5, CL = FALSE
      )

      t1 <- system.time({ r1 <- run_lslx(X = dgp$X, J = J) })
      t2 <- system.time({ r2 <- run_approxESEM(X = dgp$X, J = J,
                                                Lambda_true = dgp$Ptrue) })

      lslx_conv_vec[rep] <- r1$converged
      lslx_mse_vec[rep]  <- if (r1$converged) mean((r1$loadings - dgp$Ptrue)^2) else NA
      esem_mse_vec[rep]  <- if (r2$converged) mean((r2$loadings - dgp$Ptrue)^2) else NA
      lslx_time_vec[rep] <- t1["elapsed"]
      esem_time_vec[rep] <- t2["elapsed"]
    }

    results_all[[paste0("J", J, "_N", N)]] <- data.frame(
      J              = J,
      N              = N,
      JN_ratio       = round(J / N, 5),
      lslx_mse_mean  = mean(lslx_mse_vec,  na.rm = TRUE),
      lslx_mse_sd    = sd(lslx_mse_vec,    na.rm = TRUE),
      esem_mse_mean  = mean(esem_mse_vec,  na.rm = TRUE),
      esem_mse_sd    = sd(esem_mse_vec,    na.rm = TRUE),
      lslx_time      = mean(lslx_time_vec),
      esem_time      = mean(esem_time_vec),
      lslx_conv_rate = mean(lslx_conv_vec),
      mse_diff       = mean(esem_mse_vec,  na.rm = TRUE) -
                       mean(lslx_mse_vec,  na.rm = TRUE)
    )
    cat("   N =", N,
        "| lslx conv:", round(mean(lslx_conv_vec), 2),
        "| lslx MSE:", round(mean(lslx_mse_vec, na.rm=TRUE), 5),
        "| ESEM MSE:", round(mean(esem_mse_vec,  na.rm=TRUE), 5), "\n")
  }
  cat("   ✓ J =", J, "完成\n\n")
}

tp_df <- do.call(rbind, results_all)
tp_df <- tp_df[order(tp_df$J, tp_df$N), ]
rownames(tp_df) <- NULL
cat("=== 扫描完成，共", nrow(tp_df), "行数据 ===\n")

# ============================================================
# 图1：每个J单独一张，lslx vs ESEM MSE（带SD阴影）
# ============================================================
par(mfrow = c(2, 3), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1), oma = c(0, 0, 2.5, 0))

for (j in J_seq_main) {
  sub <- tp_df[tp_df$J == j, ]
  sub <- sub[order(sub$N), ]
  x   <- sub$N
  N_ticks <- scan_grid[[as.character(j)]]

  ylim <- range(c(sub$lslx_mse_mean + sub$lslx_mse_sd,
                  sub$lslx_mse_mean - sub$lslx_mse_sd,
                  sub$esem_mse_mean + sub$esem_mse_sd,
                  sub$esem_mse_mean - sub$esem_mse_sd), na.rm = TRUE)
  ylim[1] <- max(0, ylim[1])

  plot(x, sub$lslx_mse_mean,
       type = "b", pch = 16, col = "#E63946", lwd = 2,
       ylim = ylim,
       xlab = "N (sample size)", ylab = "MSE",
       main = paste0("MSE vs N  (J=", j, ", ", n_rep, " reps)"),
       xaxt = "n")
  axis(1, at = pretty(x, n = 6))

  # lslx SD阴影
  polygon(c(x, rev(x)),
          c(sub$lslx_mse_mean + sub$lslx_mse_sd,
            rev(sub$lslx_mse_mean - sub$lslx_mse_sd)),
          col = adjustcolor("#E63946", 0.15), border = NA)

  # ESEM线 + SD阴影
  lines(x, sub$esem_mse_mean,
        type = "b", pch = 17, col = "#457B9D", lwd = 2, lty = 2)
  polygon(c(x, rev(x)),
          c(sub$esem_mse_mean + sub$esem_mse_sd,
            rev(sub$esem_mse_mean - sub$esem_mse_sd)),
          col = adjustcolor("#457B9D", 0.15), border = NA)

  legend("topright",
         legend = c("lslx", "LASSO-ESEM"),
         col    = c("#E63946", "#457B9D"),
         lwd = 2, pch = c(16, 17), lty = c(1, 2),
         bty = "n", cex = 0.85)
}

mtext("lslx vs LASSO-ESEM  |  MSE vs N  (factor_corr = 0.3)",
      outer = TRUE, cex = 1.1, font = 2)
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))

# ============================================================
# 图2：MSE差值图（ESEM - lslx），每个J一张，零线 = turning point
# ============================================================
find_turning_point <- function(sub) {
  for (i in 2:nrow(sub)) {
    if (sub$mse_diff[i-1] < 0 & sub$mse_diff[i] >= 0) return(sub$N[i])
  }
  return(NA)
}

par(mfrow = c(2, 3), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1), oma = c(0, 0, 2.5, 0))
cols   <- c("#E63946","#F4A261","#2A9D8F","#457B9D","#6A4C93","#2D6A4F")
J_cols <- setNames(cols, as.character(J_seq_main))

for (j in J_seq_main) {
  sub   <- tp_df[tp_df$J == j, ]
  sub   <- sub[order(sub$N), ]
  x     <- sub$N
  y     <- sub$mse_diff
  tp_N  <- find_turning_point(sub)
  tp_JN <- if (!is.na(tp_N)) round(j / tp_N, 4) else NA

  ylim  <- range(y, na.rm = TRUE)
  ylim  <- ylim + c(-0.08, 0.18) * diff(ylim)

  plot(x, y,
       type = "b", pch = 16, col = J_cols[as.character(j)],
       lwd = 2, lty = 2,
       xlab = "N", ylab = "MSE diff (ESEM - lslx)",
       main = paste0("J = ", j),
       ylim = ylim, xaxt = "n")
  axis(1, at = pretty(x, n = 6))
  abline(h = 0, lty = 2, col = "gray50", lwd = 1.2)

  if (!is.na(tp_N)) {
    abline(v = tp_N, lty = 3, col = "gray40", lwd = 1.2)
    text(x = tp_N, y = max(y, na.rm = TRUE),
         labels = paste0("J/N ≈ ", tp_JN),
         adj = c(-0.1, 1.3), cex = 0.82, col = "gray25")
  }
}

mtext("MSE Difference (ESEM - lslx) vs N  |  Turning Point Analysis  (factor_corr = 0.3)",
      outer = TRUE, cex = 1.0, font = 2)
par(mfrow = c(1, 1))

# ============================================================
# Turning point 汇总表
# ============================================================
cat("\nTurning Point 汇总：\n")
tp_summary <- do.call(rbind, lapply(J_seq_main, function(j) {
  sub  <- tp_df[tp_df$J == j, ]
  sub  <- sub[order(sub$N), ]
  tp_N <- find_turning_point(sub)
  data.frame(J         = j,
             turning_N = tp_N,
             JN_ratio  = if (!is.na(tp_N)) round(j / tp_N, 4) else NA)
}))
print(tp_summary, row.names = FALSE)
```



## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
